stemHtml: Choose the correct statement for a turbojet in the NTOFP…

options.a: The maximum bank angle can be increased to 30° between 200 ft and 400 ft as part of a special procedure with prior approval from the Authority.
options.b: The maximum bank angle can be increased to 35° between 200 ft and 400 ft as part of a special procedure with prior approval from the Authority.
options.c: The maximum bank angle can be increased to 20° between 200 ft and 400 ft as part of a special procedure with prior approval from the Authority.
options.d: The maximum bank angle can be increased to 20° above 400 ft as part of a special procedure with prior approval from the Authority.
